final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a red convertible driving along Route 66 in a retro Americana road-trip scene.

Style/medium: photorealistic 35mm film photography with vintage Americana aesthetic, warm Kodachrome color grading, evoking 1960s–70s road-trip photography
Composition: wide-angle side-tracking shot, car centered in frame, open road stretching to the horizon, vast sky occupying upper half
Subject: cherry-red classic American convertible in motion, top down, open road ahead, sense of speed and freedom
Scene/backdrop: Route 66 desert highway, arid flatlands flanked by saguaro cacti and dry scrubland, distant mesa silhouettes
Lighting/mood: golden-hour sunset light raking low across the desert, sky blazing in deep orange and crimson, long dramatic shadows across the asphalt, mood of liberation and wanderlust
Color palette: burnt orange and crimson sky as dominant field, cherry red car as hero accent, muted sand and sage desert as neutral ground
Materials/textures: weathered asphalt with faded center-line markings, dusty desert earth, sun-bleached cacti
Avoid: modern SUVs or electric vehicles, overcast sky, cool blue tones, neon colors, deformed wheels, watermark
